mapper.select: SELECT id, space_code, floor, type, status, remark FROM parking_space ORDER BY space_code ASC
SELECT id, space_code, floor, type, status, remark FROM parking_space WHERE status = 'FREE' ORDER BY space_code ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO parking_space (space_code, floor, type, status, remark) VALUES (#{spaceCode}, #{floor}, #{type}, #{status}, #{remark})
mapper.update: UPDATE parking_space SET space_code = #{spaceCode}, floor = #{floor}, type = #{type}, status = #{status}, remark = #{remark} WHERE id = #{id}
